email-sending.name: Resend
email-sending.desc: Layanan pengiriman email modern dengan API sederhana dan dukungan React Email.

email-sending.name: Nodemailer
email-sending.desc: Library SMTP populer untuk mengirim email dari server Node.js.

email-sending.name: SendGrid
email-sending.desc: Layanan email massal dengan API yang kaya dan template builder.

email-sending.name: Mailgun
email-sending.desc: API pengiriman email untuk developer, dengan fitur validasi dan tracking.

email-sending.name: Plunk
email-sending.desc: Email API yang simpel dan open-source friendly.

email-templates.name: React Email
email-templates.desc: Membuat template email dengan komponen React dan mengirimnya via Resend / Nodemailer.

email-templates.name: MJML
email-templates.desc: Framework markup untuk mendesain email responsif tanpa rasa sakit.

email-templates.name: Handlebars (Nodemailer)
email-templates.desc: Menggunakan template engine Handlebars dengan Nodemailer untuk email dinamis.

email-templates.name: Maizzle
email-templates.desc: Framework untuk membangun email HTML dengan Tailwind CSS.
email-templates.example: Hello

toast-notifications.name: Sonner
toast-notifications.desc: Toast notification ringan dan mudah digunakan di React.
toast-notifications.example:
import { toast } from 'sonner'

toast('Event has been created')
toast.success('Berhasil disimpan!')
toast.error('Terjadi kesalahan')

toast-notifications.name: React Hot Toast
toast-notifications.desc: Alternatif toast notification dengan API simpel dan animasi keren.
toast-notifications.example:
import toast, { Toaster } from 'react-hot-toast'

toast.success('Berhasil!')
toast.error('Gagal')

toast-notifications.name: React Toastify
toast-notifications.desc: Library toast notification yang sangat customizable.
toast-notifications.example:
import { toast } from 'react-toastify'

toast('Default notification')
toast.success('Success!')
toast.info('Info')

push-notifications.name: Web Push API
push-notifications.desc: Mengirim notifikasi push ke browser melalui service worker.

push-notifications.name: Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)
push-notifications.desc: Mengirim notifikasi push ke web & mobile via Firebase.

push-notifications.name: OneSignal
push-notifications.desc: Layanan notifikasi push cross-platform dengan dashboard.

push-notifications.name: Notifee (React Native)
push-notifications.desc: Library untuk menampilkan notifikasi lokal di aplikasi React Native.

webhook-events.name: Resend Webhooks
webhook-events.desc: Menerima event seperti email delivered, bounced, complained.

webhook-events.name: SendGrid Event Webhook
webhook-events.desc: Menerima event dari SendGrid (delivered, open, click, dll).
